description: Baseline: 100% evidence detection, 10% FP rate (moment@2.30.1), combined score 0.96

asi.target: Reduce FP rate to <5% while maintaining 100% evidence detection

description: Fix: Pass actual file path to detector (was passing directory), add i18n skip in homoglyph detector. Result: 0% FP rate, 100% evidence detection.

asi.changes: 1) Fixed scanner.rs to pass entry_path instead of directory path to engine.scan(), enabling path-based i18n detection. 2) Added i18n path skip in homoglyph.rs for /locale/, /locales/, /i18n/, etc.
asi.hypothesis: Fix file path propagation so i18n detection works correctly

description: Confirmation run: Fix is stable. 0% FP rate, 100% evidence detection maintained.

asi.hypothesis: Verify stability of fix across multiple runs
asi.result: Fix is stable - consistent 0% FP, 100% evidence detection
